title: viola kitaibeliana subsp. trimestris
intro: Viola kitaibeliana subsp. trimestris, also known as the Autumnal Viola, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Violet family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola kitaibeliana subsp. trimestris include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
